name: Sakae Electronics Corporation
summary: Sakae Electronics Corporation trades in electronic components in Japan. Its products are used in semiconductor/FPD manufacturing, measurement/semiconductor inspection, medical/beauty, ship, food/beverage/pharmaceutical inspection, logistics/transportation/packaging, printing, and other industrial equipment, as well as railway broadcasting systems, highway display boards, tunnel construction equipment, etc. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
